codeReview.summary: Reviewed worker session 61a10e99-5890-4d85-b26b-b84321d40d4f and commit 37d8c572. The change correctly replaces the remaining direct business IllegalArgumentException throws in MfaService with ApplicationException(ErrorCode.AUTH_MFA_INVALID), aligning with the feature’s error-handling standard. No blocking implementation defects were found in the submitted diff.

issues.description: The changed activate()/disable() invalid-code branches in MfaService are not directly covered by this unit test class (which currently exercises verifyDuringLogin only). Consider adding focused tests for invalid activation and disable verifiers to guard this mapping explicitly.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The backend-worker skill mandates test-first bug-fix workflow, but this fix run made behavior changes without adding a failing/regression test; the handoff still marked followedProcedure=true. The skill or review criteria may need clarification for micro-fixes where existing coverage is reused.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff for session 61a10e99-5890-4d85-b26b-b84321d40d4f reports tests.added as [] and only source file update in MfaService.java; transcript skeleton shows execution of existing MfaServiceTest suite only.

summary: Pass. The submitted commit resolves the remaining MFA IllegalArgumentException usage per feature intent and introduces no blocking issues; one non-blocking test coverage gap was noted.
